sanskrit:
मच्चित्ता मद्गतप्राणा बोधयन्तः परस्परम्।
कथयन्तश्च मां नित्यं तुष्यन्ति च रमन्ति च॥
transliteration:
mac-cittā mad-gata-prāṇā bodhayantaḥ parasparam
kathayantaś ca māṁ nityaṁ tuṣyanti ca ramanti ca
literal_meaning: Me-minded / Me-gone-life-forces / enlightening / one-another / speaking / and / Me / always / are-satisfied / and / they-delight
contextual_meaning: When attention is fully anchored in a single meaningful focus, the psyche becomes self-sustaining: members mirror one another’s insights, narrative loops reinforce identity, and the system rewards itself with durable affective highs.
psychological_state: Secure group flow: low self-referential processing, high oxytocin, narrative coherence around shared sacred figure.
trigger_scenario: A tight-knit fandom, recovery group, or activist circle that meets nightly on Zoom to retell founding stories, reinforcing purpose and mutual soothing.
anchor_text: Hold one shared focus and the group feeds itself with joy.
